description: Convert the high-power rocket at ~/Documents/rockets/dual_parachute_deployment.ork to a 'minimum diameter' configuration to drastically reduce aerodynamic drag and maximize altitude. Modify the design so all exterior body tubes and the nose cone base have an outer diameter of 41.6 mm (Radius 20.8 mm) and an inner diameter of 38.0 mm (Thickness 1.8 mm). Remove the internal 'Motor mount tube' and all associated centering rings, ensuring the motor is assigned directly to the aft-most exterior body tube. Adjust the packed length of both the drogue and main parachutes to at least 15 cm to accommodate the narrower airframe. Save the modified design to ~/Documents/rockets/minimum_diameter.ork and provide a report at ~/Documents/exports/min_diameter_report.txt documenting the final simulated apogee and confirming the removal of internal structures.
